SECRET//ORCON

Page 1 fires DefaultFill caveated-implies-noforn.

(S//ORCON) Single caveated dissem; no NOFORN.

TOP SECRET//SI//RELIDO

Page 2 fires DefaultFill sci-implies-relido.

(TS//SI) Single SCI portion.

SECRET//REL TO USA, GBR//NOFORN

Page 3 fires Supersession h8-p145-overlays.

(S//REL TO USA, GBR//NF) REL TO and NOFORN; supersession clears REL TO.

TOP SECRET//SI-G//NOFORN

Page 4 fires Closure plus DefaultFill caveated-implies-noforn.

(TS//SI-G) SI-G implies ORCON cone bit; ORCON triggers default-fill.
